## Validation

<!-- How did you verify the document is accurate and usable? -->

- [ ] Links and paths checked.
- [ ] Commands or examples reviewed for copy/paste safety.
- [ ] Secret values are not present.
- [ ] Dates, hostnames, IPs, and service names were verified where possible.

## Reviewer Checklist

- [ ] The document has a clear owner or audience.
- [ ] The document distinguishes current state from desired state.
- [ ] The document avoids stale or ambiguous operational instructions.
- [ ] The document does not expose credentials or sensitive tokens.
